chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1371 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 05.06.2025 Mr. Ahmed Mehran Goraya, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Tariq Hameed Qureshi, Advocate for Respondent No.4 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Counsel for Respondent No.4 has filed a statement, which is taken on record and submits that second installment of the remaining amount of Rs.281,780/- a cheque of Rs.93,926/- has been deposited in the petitioner’s bank account. He further undertakes that the remaining amount will be paid equally on monthly basis in two installments to the petitioner. Learned Counsel for the petitioner expressing his satisfaction seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. In case of non-compliance the violators may face the contempt proceedings. Judge Judge ARBROHI
